title: Add activity_service unit tests for core CRUD
description: Add tests/unit/test_activity_service.py covering core activity_service methods: test_create_activity_returns_api_response (assert bool(result) is True, result.data is not None), test_get_activity_found (create then get, assert name matches), test_get_activity_not_found (get id=9999, assert bool is False), test_update_activity (update content, assert changed), test_delete_activity (delete then get, assert not found), test_list_activities_pagination (create 3, list page_size=2, assert len==2, total==3). Use ActivityService() with Activity model.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_activity_service.py -v — all 6 tests pass; ActivityService uses in-memory storage, no DATABASE_URL needed; fixture 'activity_service' creates fresh instance per test
